name: azure-iot-mcp-server
description: Mock Azure IoT Hub / Edge as a stdio MCP server — plant-floor devices (spindles, conveyors, robotic arms, vision systems), time-series telemetry, downtime events with cause codes, and per-line OEE rollups.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('dist/server.js', 0o755)" && rm -rf dist/data && cp -R src/data dist/data
